title: Alain
summary: A monochrome portrait of a long-haired cat resting on a raised platform.
description: This is Alain, a male Ragdoll cat who was a resident at the cat café Maison de Moggy in Edinburgh. I had the pleasure of visiting the café on several occasions and was able to capture a number of photographs during my time there. Alain has since retired from café life, but during my visits he was playful, affectionate, and wonderfully relaxed around the camera, allowing me to get these memorable shots of him.
details: A close-up, low-angle black-and-white photograph capturing a long-haired cat from below, with paws and face prominently framed. The minimal indoor background and strong contrast draw attention to texture and expression.

title: Fero
summary: A detailed portrait of a long-haired cat in an outdoor setting.
description: This is Mooka, a very shy Norwegian Forest cat from Glasgow. He belonged to a neighbour of my wife’s parents and would often wander over to spend time relaxing in their garden. I captured this photograph from a safe distance, giving him the space he clearly preferred.
details: The subject is framed tightly to emphasise facial features and fur texture. A soft, muted background helps isolate the subject while retaining a natural outdoor feel.

title: First quarter
summary: A sharply focused view of the moon during its first quarter phase.
description: Taken in Paisley, Scotland at around 10:30pm on May 20, 2021, this is my clearest and most detailed photograph of the moon so far, and serves as a marker of how much my photography has progressed since my earliest shots with this camera.
details: The image highlights surface texture and craters along the terminator line. Strong contrast between illuminated and shadowed areas emphasises depth and detail.

title: Footprints
summary: A snow-covered woodland path marked by a trail of footprints.
description: I grew up with winters filled with snow days — watching it fall outside the window and building snowmen in the garden. During a visit home as an adult, I experienced snowfall on a scale I hadn’t seen since childhood. This photograph was taken in the woods behind my childhood home, capturing a moment that felt both familiar and rare.
details: Fresh snow blankets trees and ground, creating a quiet winter atmosphere. Footprints lead through the scene, adding scale, direction, and narrative.

title: Gorjuss
imageAlt: Shot from behind a woman as she walks through the snow as it falls.
summary: A candid winter moment captured during snowfall.
description: An unexpected snowfall at the home of my wife’s parents turned into an unplanned walk out into the winter landscape. With no real intention behind it, this photograph came together entirely by chance — a moment shaped by the conditions rather than a plan.
details: A portrait-oriented composition focused on motion, weather, and mood.

title: Reflect
summary: Rain droplets on glass overlooking a blurred city street.
description: This was a last‑minute photograph, taken while walking through the city of Leeds. I noticed hundreds of rain droplets scattered across the glass, each catching the light, and then the reflection behind them. For a brief moment, it felt like two worlds were blending into one — reality and reflection layered together through the glass.
details: Raindrops cling sharply to the glass surface while the urban scene behind remains out of focus. The black-and-white treatment enhances contrast and texture.

title: Rhodos
summary: A wide coastal view overlooking a town and sea on a clear day.
description: Taken on my first trip to the island of Rhodes, this photograph looks out over the old town at the northern tip of the island. It was a breathtaking view of the coastline, where it gently blends out into the deep blue of the sea.
details: White buildings line the shoreline, meeting deep blue water and sky. Dry foreground terrain provides visual contrast and depth.

title: Ripples
summary: A solitary swan floating on gently rippling water.
description: This photograph was the result of patience and timing, waiting for the moment the swan turned towards me as it surfaced from the water. The angle of its head and the small droplets falling from its beak, rippling the surface below, became an unexpected bonus. There was originally a hint of colour in the beak, but stripping that back allowed the image to settle naturally into monochrome, where the framing and contrast spoke for themselves.
details: The monochrome composition highlights repeating ripple patterns. Minimal framing centres the subject in a calm, balanced scene.

title: Solitude
summary: A quiet, snow-covered park scene framed by bare trees.
description: A light dusting of snow had me reaching for my camera before heading to work one morning. Taken in Glasgow’s West End, this scene comes from a small park beside the water at Kelvinbridge. Everything felt unusually quiet and serene, echoing the mood of an old oil painting from the early twentieth century. The bare branches stretch upward and weave together with the surrounding trees, forming a kind of natural canopy and sheltering the stillness below.
details: Snow-laden branches dominate the scene, creating intricate detail. A bench in the background adds scale and a sense of stillness.

title: Ten pins
summary: A set of worn bowling pins stand at the end of a lane.
description: I don’t get to go bowling as often as I’d like, but on one night out I brought my camera along to see what I could capture. The lighting in the venue made action shots difficult, and many didn’t quite land the way I hoped, but this image immediately stood out. The worn, rustic look of the pins, the reflections stretching across the lane, and the subtle tilt of the frame all came together naturally. The pins peeking through from behind add an unexpected sense of depth, creating a layered, almost three‑dimensional shadow effect that gives the image its character.

title: The dreamer
summary: A young kitten resting on a sunlit stone step.
description: This photograph is the second in a three‑part series featuring the same litter of kittens: The Yearner, The Dreamer, and The Adventurer. The images were taken as they played together on a staircase outside a small home on the outskirts of northern Rhodes. Their mother stayed close by, quietly watching over them as they climbed and explored.
details: Natural light highlights the texture of stone and fur. The relaxed pose creates an intimate, candid moment.

title: Tranquility
imageAlt: Long exposure photo of a pond taken in the Portland Japanese Gardens.
summary: A long-exposure landscape shot of a pond from Portland Japanese Gardens.
description: In 2017, I took what felt like a once‑in‑a‑lifetime trip to Portland and Seattle, with a visit to the Japanese Gardens being one of the highlights. The gardens were absolutely beautiful, offering a sense of calm and balance that invited slower, more considered photography. This image required patience and careful framing, as I aimed to create an ikebana‑inspired triangular composition using the stone lantern, the waterfall, and the triangular rock in the koi pond.
details: Part of a series focused on calm, atmospheric scenes from gardens and parks.

title: Waves
imageAlt: View of waves crashing into a concrete pier on the island of Rhodos.
summary: High-energy seascape with dramatic wave impact and color gradients.
description: This is undoubtedly one of my favourite photographs from my entire collection. Taken on the north‑west side of the island during my second visit, it captures a blustery afternoon with strong winds driving waves into a long stone pier. The way the sea blends into the sky still blows me away, with mist from the crashing waves rising and towering over pier.
details: Captured on Rhodos, this shot emphasizes texture, force, and geometric framing.

title: Call me cupid
imageAlt: Macro shot of the head and chestplate of the Darkhorse Halo Infinite Master Chief statue.
summary: A close-up of a Master Chief figure from Halo, with dramatic lighting and lens flare.
description: A macro photograph focusing on the head and chestplate of a Halo Infinite Master Chief statue. The lighting creates a cinematic effect, with lens flare and soft focus on the edges. The details of the armor, including the number 117, are clearly visible, highlighting the craftsmanship of the figure.
details: The shot uses a shallow depth of field and backlighting to emphasize the contours and textures of the figure’s helmet and armor. The composition draws attention to the iconic design and the play of light across the surface.

title: Podarcis sicula
imageAlt: Lizard basking on a sunlit rock.
summary: A sunlit lizard basking on a pale rock in a dry, grassy environment.
description: A close-up photograph of a lizard, likely a Podarcis species, resting on a sun-bleached rock. The lizard’s scales display a mix of green, brown, and blue hues, and the dry grass in the background suggests a warm, Mediterranean habitat. The image captures the animal’s alert posture and the texture of both its skin and the stone.
details: The lizard is positioned diagonally across the frame, with sunlight highlighting its scales and casting sharp shadows. The background is softly blurred, drawing attention to the reptile’s intricate markings and the rough surface of the rock.

title: Tramonto
imageAlt: Sunset in Castellamarre di Stabia in Italy, from the Hotel dei Congressi
summary: A vivid orange sunset behind silhouetted trees and distant mountains.
description: A striking photograph of the sun setting behind a line of trees, with the sky glowing in deep orange hues. The silhouettes of the trees and the faint outline of mountains create a layered effect, while the sun is partially visible on the horizon, casting a warm glow over the landscape.
details: The image features a strong color gradient from orange to dark, with crisp silhouettes of trees and a clear, round sun. The composition emphasizes the beauty of the natural world at dusk.

title: Time travelling
imageAlt: Long-exposure night shot of a carnival with Ferris wheel and colorful lights.
summary: A long-exposure night shot of a carnival, featuring a spinning Ferris wheel and colorful lights.
description: A vibrant nighttime photograph of a city carnival, with a Ferris wheel captured in motion through long exposure, creating a glowing circular blur. The foreground shows cobblestone streets and a brightly lit game booth, while colorful lights and starbursts from street lamps add energy to the scene.
details: The image uses long exposure to capture the movement of the Ferris wheel and passing lights, resulting in dynamic streaks and glowing effects. The composition balances the illuminated attractions with the dark night sky and urban surroundings.

title: One touch
imageAlt: Person standing on a forest path, backlit by sunlight.
summary: A person stands on a forest path, backlit by strong sunlight streaming through the trees.
description: A dramatic black-and-white photograph showing a person standing on a wooded path, surrounded by tall trees. The sun is low in the sky, creating intense rays and deep shadows that silhouette the figure and highlight the texture of the grass and foliage. The scene evokes a sense of solitude and tranquility.
details: The composition uses strong contrast between light and shadow, with the sun’s rays radiating outward and the path leading the viewer’s eye into the distance. The figure is centered, adding a focal point to the serene natural setting.
